facts.value: approximately 20
small round face
long, permed and highlighted
slightly sallow skin
tiny and slender; small because always in motion (kinetic and capable, never fragile)
approximately 5'0"
Dry, observational
Needling — the register that brings Pace's patent-monologue down to size

value.claim: Sheri needs to hear the full story before acting
value.correct_statement: She does not need the story; she needs only the name and ten minutes

facts.value: running, cycling, kung fu, dancing
fierceness that functions as her warmth
Psychology undergraduate
holds her temper, normally restrained
Sees Pace clearly as a friend rather than as a man; his masculine register has no purchase on her, so she perceives Pace himself rather than being caught in his self-presentation
Warm in the manner of someone who has decided, at cost, who is worth defending; warmth expressed through fierceness rather than pleasantness
working/country idiom, not campus polished-sorority register
Structural, not temperamental — loyal because Pace is the single surviving counterexample to the lesson her family taught her, not because she is a loyal sort of person
Pace's one outside-the-house friendship the novel shows him keeping; a confidante
Perceives Pace clearly via a glancing, Pace-specific radar — not a diagnostic instrument
occupies the third makeup position in the novel's three-women appearance grammar: visible effort, imperfect result, no shame
Was disowned; her radar is 'disowning-honed' and tuned to her wound's exact shape
"She's a lot."
Mediocre/ordinary at school — not stupid, but uninterested in being graded
Single-ping read on people; delivers one verdict and is done, does not analyze or diagnose
Knows only that Pace is different in a way that makes him 'the kind of kind that doesn't blow away'
Deflates/punctures Pace's intellectualism, affectionately needling his competence back down to size
came out (implied LGBTQ+); publicly came out last year
Her single defining characteristic is a threat-response, residue of a betrayal (see Backstory)
Her loyalty to Pace can be trusted absolutely
tried, result is a little wrong, does not care that it's a little wrong (no shame)

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering Pace and his masculine self-presentation (how he reads to women-who-might-want-him)
behavioral_states.response: The masculine channel is switched off entirely; she meets the friend rather than the man
behavioral_states.observable: Meets Pace 'with that whole channel switched off'; sees the friend instead of the man
distinguish_from: Cassie's immunity (outside the appearance economy, reads configuration/Randi for operation, not Pace)

behavioral_states.trigger: social setting at the CW bar
behavioral_states.response: wears too much makeup, awkwardly applied, without shame about the imperfect result

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering anything fake, cruel, or conditional — especially whoever has hurt Pace
behavioral_states.response: Held temper aimed outward at the person who caused harm
behavioral_states.observable: Held temper directed outward; fierceness rather than pleasant warmth

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace performs his intellectualism/competence (e.g. the patent-monologue on a bike ride)
behavioral_states.response: Deflates it affectionately, needles it back down to size rather than being dazzled
behavioral_states.observable: Dry, observational remarks puncturing his intellectual performance

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering people who withdraw their love/affection when the terms change (conditional people)
behavioral_states.response: Her radar pings once; she recognizes the type and issues a single verdict without elaboration
behavioral_states.observable: A single terse verdict (e.g. 'She's a lot.'); no sustained analysis

behavioral_states.response: offers immediate action with no questions asked ('Give me ten minutes'); needs only the name and the time, not the story
behavioral_states.observable: asks for the name and ten minutes, no questions, no need for explanation

temporal_states.value: disowned by church friends, brother, father, and mother simultaneously
Held temper aimed outward at whoever hurt Pace is the engine of her last appearance
temporal_states.after_event: Her last appearance (referenced as 'below' but not provided in this excerpt)

temporal_states.value: Delivers a payback that 'lands' at the end of the story
temporal_states.after_event: the end of the story (payback to/for Pace)

properties.note: Sees Pace as a friend rather than as a man; immune to his masculine register

Two clarities, opposite mechanisms. Cassie is outside the appearance economy (reads Randi/configuration for operation); Sheri is outside Pace's economy (sees Pace himself). Explicitly must not converge.
properties.shared_feature: both possess a form of clarity/immunity

relationships.properties: Sheri is tiny and slender set against Pace, who is strongly built and average height
Cassie occupies the 'doesn't try' position (no makeup, eschewed not lacked); Sheri occupies the 'visible effort, no shame' position
Randi occupies the 'labor invisible' position (work that doesn't show); Sheri's effort is visible and imperfect

properties.note: Receives the same patent-monologue Pace would give an empty room

properties.manner: spent time with her, listened to her cry, bought her bacon cheeseburgers after cycling
properties.quality: the true gesture chosen over the expected one; constancy of treatment

properties.status: disowned her after she came out
disowned her after she came out
disowned her after she came out
disowned her after she came out

properties.basis: radar ping identifying Pace as a conditional person who withdraws when terms change

properties.contrast: Both issue warnings, but different instruments: Cassie structural/sustained, Sheri a single ping from a different sensor

properties.note: Pace deflects Sheri's read; the reader files it next to Cassie's warning

properties.nature: The one outside-the-house bond the novel shows Pace keeping
properties.perception: Sees Pace clearly via glancing, Pace-specific radar

properties.note: Both are confidantes who see clearly but for structurally opposite reasons; Sheri is a true variant, not a mirror

properties.nature: Directs held temper outward at whoever hurts Pace; defends Pace fiercely

properties.knowledge_gap: she does not know the causes of his nature
properties.loyalty_basis: structural — he is the one bond that proved load-bearing when everything built to hold didn't

properties.lesson: bonds built to hold do not prove load-bearing; Pace is the single surviving counterexample to this lesson

properties.note: her protective action is on his behalf; the document instructs that Pace neither accepts nor declines on the page
properties.nature: the one surviving bond, paying back the debt of having survived

negations.claim: Sheri needs to hear the full story before acting
negations.correct_statement: She does not need the story; she needs only the name and ten minutes
